evals.name: standard-release
evals.prompt: We're ready to cut a new release of the ngrok-operator. Look at what's changed since the last release and prepare the changelogs and version suggestions.
evals.expected_output: Changelog entries for container (18 PRs), helm chart (1 PR), and CRDs (4 PRs). Version suggestions based on change types. Correct Keep-a-Changelog format with PR links and @author attribution.

evals.name: patch-bugfixes
evals.prompt: We just merged a few bug fixes and improvements. Let's do a quick patch release to get them out. Prepare the changelogs.
evals.expected_output: Same PR data as eval 1 (same repo state), but agent should recognize most changes are fixes and suggest patch versions. Changelogs should still be complete and well-formatted.

evals.name: crd-changes
evals.prompt: Time for a release. I know some PRs touched the CRD definitions, so make sure the ngrok-crds chart gets updated too. Prepare everything.
evals.expected_output: Agent should explicitly address CRD changes, bump the CRDs chart version, generate CRD changelog, and update the dependency in the main helm chart. All 3 changelogs present.
